entry.title: Re: Facing below error Inbound processing in endpoint at...
entry.content:
Hi 

Check this SAP note 2700622

Regards

SS

entry.title: How to Use Different Production Version for External Procurement and In-House Production in MRP?
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm currently using 'Both Procurement Types' for a specific semi-finished material, where the material is sometimes procured externally and sometimes produced in-house.

However, the BOM differs depending on the procurement type:

  • For External Procurement, the material follows one BOM structure.
  • For In-House Production, the material follows a different BOM structure (Alternative: 02).

To handle this, I have created alternative BOMs (two versions of BOM) and also defined two production versions.

Now, when MRP generates a planned order for this material:

  • If the planned order is converted into a purchase requisition, I want to use Production Version 001.
  • If the planned order is converted into a production order, I want to use Production Version 002.

Could anyone guide me on how to configure this in the system so that the correct production version is selected based on the procurement type?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Enter Manual Contract Accruals
entry.content: Hello, Checking the documentation, I think it should be OK to use the same function: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/89d896ca9cd64318b1667df5ec00e4b2/1c46d261704c4bc8b98bb707748c9b6a.html According to my knowledge, it's not possible to change the accounts by default. Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: Re: Using NPM Packages in UI5 without Shims
entry.content:
@pmuessig ,
We tried loading a react-component as part of our current Ui5 project we were able to do it using cdn and then converting the react code using babel to amd and then importing it to ui5 module. 

But While trying to load it using node_modules we followed this blog but were not able to load react getting below error.
The basic idea for us is to have a react component for dynamic user interaction in few sections of our ui5 project.

entry.title: Re: Mass Data Updates from Excel in UI5 and Fiori elements with this Open Source Project
entry.content:
@rahullohia yes, you have to specify the version you´re using, this is a feature, not a bug. And i just released a bug fix yesterday to a new version (changelog)

It is to better control which version you´re using. This is aimed at more to a ABAP Stack Deployment.
I wrote a blog post about it here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/create-a-ui5-custom-library-with-versioning-using-a-multi-version-namespace/ba-p/13567207 

Also, thank you for using my component. Any suggestions or feedback is welcome!

entry.title: Re: SAP Router (seclogin: Can't add credentials)
entry.content:
Hi Farhan,

Make sure that the environment parameter has a definition of 'SECUDIR'

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation

For other AI features in SuccessFactors, I would request you to contact your account team for details.

Best Regards,

Sharath

entry.title: Blending Live data with import data option in Model or Story Level
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I am facing issues in blending Live data to Import data, We have already built a dashboard with import data, so linking up live data is the requirement. But we are facing difficulties on it,

In model level also not able to connect 

In story level also I am able to link dimensions only in Charts, Table Link dimension option is not available in Optimized designing.

Request your insight on this possibility.

entry.title: Re: Limitations in Capacity Planning in SAP S/4HANA Publi...
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, traditional capacity planning transactions like CM25 and CM27
are replaced by Fiori applications such as Manage Work Center Capacity, Capacity Scheduling Table, and Capacity Scheduling Board.
These tools offer modern interfaces and functionalities to handle various capacity planning scenarios.

1. Handling Large Volumes of Production Orders:

When managing numerous short-duration production orders, it's essential to efficiently schedule and adjust them as needed.
The Capacity Scheduling Table app is particularly useful in this context. It provides a user-friendly interface that allows planners
to dispatch and deallocate bottleneck operations of orders transparently and easily. This tool facilitates the realignment of operations,
enabling planners to shift orders left or right to optimize the schedule and address overload situations.

2. Managing Multiple Capacities in a Work Center:

In scenarios where operations need to be distributed across multiple capacities within a work center,
the Manage Work Center Capacity app offers a clear visualization of both capacities and loads. This visibility allows planners to
detect overload situations and make informed decisions to balance the load effectively. While the app doesn't directly adjust the planned finish date,
it provides the necessary insights to ensure that Available-to-Promise (ATP) dates reflect accurate availability based on current capacity allocations.
c

3. Integration with HR Work Schedules:

Currently, SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, does not support direct integration with HR work schedules for capacity availability.
However, planners can manually adjust work center capacities to account for employee absences such as sick leave or vacation. By proactively
managing these adjustments, planners can ensure that capacity planning remains accurate and reflects the actual availability of resources.

For a practical demonstration of managing work center capacities, you might find the following video helpful:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=12HlcLFeI94

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation
entry.content:
Hi @Marcos_Ramos ,

1. This helps in access control. Do you face any problems accessing this link ? 

2. The texts will be inferred based on multiple combinations. Even if it is single word or a text, the AI inference will kick in. And yes, the translations will be available if you have activated the supported languages, as shared above in the blog.

Best Regards,

Sharath

entry.title: Re: How to Use Different Production Version for External...
entry.content:
To ensure the correct production version is selected based on the procurement type in MRP, follow these steps:

1. Maintain Production Versions: In transaction C223 (or in the "Manage Production Versions" app in Fiori), define two production versions:
001 → For External Procurement
002 → For InHouse Production

2. Set Procurement Type in Material Master:
In MM02, under the MRP 2 view, set Procurement Type = Both (E & F).

3. Assign Production Versions in the Source List (ME01):
Define a source list entry for external procurement and assign Production Version 001.

4. Maintain Quota Arrangement (MEQ1 if required):
Assign the correct production version based on the procurement percentage for planned orders.

5. Check MRP Strategy & BOM Selection:
Ensure the correct lotsizing and BOM selection are maintained in the production version settings.

This setup ensures that when converting a planned order to a purchase requisition,
Production Version 001 is used, and when converting to a production order, Production Version 002 is applied.

entry.title: How to cancel the customer contract invoice request
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a customer contract that was canceled by a user but they did not cancel the invoice request associated with this contract.
Can you help cancel the customer invoice invoice request?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to cancel the customer contract invoice request
entry.content:
The reason the Customer Contract Invoice Request is showing with the status To Be Invoiced, is because you have selected the Keep Invoice Requests in the Invoice Cancellation field of the Contract. 

As the Cancellation of the Item has already been completed, you are no longer able to change the Invoice Cancellation to Cancel Pending Invoice Requests. Also, since there is no Invoice Schedule maintained and the items are directly Invoiced via the Customer Contract Invoice Request, the invoice request cannot be cancelled anymore.

Please see below the behavior between Keep Invoice Requests and Cancel Pending Invoice Requests.

Keep Invoice Requests: The system will not cancel any Invoice Requests.
Cancel Pending Invoice Requests: System will cancel any Invoice Requests that are in the status To Be Invoiced.

 

Since the customer contract is completed, no any further changes is allowed. To close the invoice request, you can invoice the Customer Contract Invoice Request with a 0 Amount.

see KBA: 3388525 - Cannot Cancel Customer Contract Invoice Request

entry.title: Re: DNS configuration details for Onboarding Form in SAP...
entry.content:
1. DNS Configuration & Subdomains: DNS is used to resolve domain names for SAP S/4HANA RISE. A subdomain organizes network traffic,
and primary/secondary DNS ensures redundancy.
2. Existing vs. New DNS: You can use the existing DNS details in the COF and update them later when the new domain is ready.
Inform SAP support to facilitate a smooth transition.
3. S2D Document Requirement: If S2D details are mandatory but unavailable, consult SAP support for alternative documentation options.
Reference Guide: [Pre-provisioning Best Practices for RISE with SAP](https://nttdata-solutions.com/us/blog/pre-provisioning-for-a-seamless-rise-with-sap-deployment/)

entry.title: Re: what does "fra3" in the FQDN stand for?
entry.content:
"fra3" in the FQDN likely refers to an SAP data center region or availability zone, not necessarily the city Frankfurt.
SAP uses such codes to denote specific infrastructure zones within cloud provider regions (e.g., Azure, AWS).

"fra" typically represents Frankfurt, but "fra3" could be an internal SAP designation for a specific cluster or network segment.
The presence of "fra3" in Amsterdam suggests it may be a logical assignment rather than a strict geographical reference.
"rot" likely refers to SAP’s data center in St. LeonRot, Germany.

entry.title: MRP Run not considering firm PRs and POs and creating duplicate PRs
entry.content:
I have a scenario where there are 2 plants X and Y. When MRP is run in plant X, it checks for stock in plant Y due to the special procurement key and creates an external PR if the material is not available in Y as well. Now consider, PR1 is generated in plant Y, we change it manually and point it to plant X and the PR becomes firm. 

When we run the MRP again in plant X, even with the existence of a firm PR, or even if we convert it to PO, it does not consider their presence and creates a duplicate PR for the same qty in plant X for plant Y.

How do I ensure MRP run considers firm PRs and POs when rerun is executed?

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Authorization issues
entry.content: hi, is by deleting and creating a new sub-account the only way to do this? im having the same issue as well right now. i can access the lobby however cannot open any of my projects

entry.title: Re: How to show the Story Filter value in a Textbox in SAC?
entry.content:
Hello,

I wanted to say, that you can use a script for that, but it seems that the getdimensionfilter on the story filter is full buggy.

As workaround, you can place an inputcontrol with same dimension as the story filter and you use the inputcontrol as dynamic test link. For me it's working. And then you hide the input control.

I hope this works for you too

 

cya

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation
entry.content: It takes you to a sharepoint login page, not accessible to watch this video, which sounds really interesting & helpful.

entry.title: Re: Routing: Alternative Sequence & Parallel Sequence in SAP
entry.content:
Hi, very nice article.

In the same context, I was wondering if anybody ever faced the following scenario and found a solution. We have some workcenters that can be used to split the work. i.e. When at operation 200, I have 2 workcenters that can do the same work, which means the lead time of operation 200 can be half. 

I know, standard SAP advice is to increase the capactity of the workcenter, but the issue is that these workcenters are also used separately in other routings. So I need to be able to plan them individually. 

We are working with production orders with big quantities, so for planning, this split over 2 workcenters can have a big influence on the lead time of the production order, but also on the load and availability of both workcenters. 

I would appreciate if somebody could maybe share experiences on this. 

 

kr

entry.title: Re: How to mass upload from a spreadsheet file into an SAP Fiori app in SAP BTP ABAP Environment Par
entry.content: @ngocle—Thank you for your comment. If I understand you correctly, you want to export the records displayed in the list report. If so, you can do that using the standard export feature of the FIORI Elements. This allows you to download the record in a spreadsheet. Just for this use case, I don't think any custom implementation is required. However, if you have some specific custom requirement, which can not be achieved through the standard feature, you can utilize the downloadFile RAP action and introduce a new button 'Download' on the list report table header to invoke the 'downloadFile' RAP action. This will internally retrieve all the records of the RAP BO based on the filter criteria and utilize XLSX write API to download the records in a spreadsheet.

entry.title: Inquiry about MRP plan order generation divided into production version
entry.content:
Hello, I am posting because I have an MRP question about the production version.

One material code uses two production versions. PIR established requirements using two production versions on a daily basis.

Because each production version has a different working line (routing), two production versions must be used in one material code.

In the PIR, the required amount was generated for each production version, and when the MRP is switched, it is combined into one production version based on the same date to create a planned order.

As shown in the picture below, I would really appreciate it if you could let me know if the PIR made for other production versions on the same date is divided into the same as PIR when executing the MRP, so that the planning order can be created for a total of two in the production version.


Please give me an answer that I can solve.
It's essential, so if you know it, please answer it.
Thank you.

entry.title: SAP analytics cloud integration with Saviynt (Import users and Teams)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have configured the REST connection to connect to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)to create and sync data between Saviynt and SAC.

I am able to create users in SAC from Saviynt, but when I try to pull users from SAC to saviynt I get 200 success response but DENY messages in cors

SameSite=None, x-content-type-options: nosniff, x-frame-options: DENY, x-vcap-request-id: a32d2XXf-d7fe-XXX33-6XXXXXX, x-xss-protection: 1; mode=block, transfer-encoding: chunked, strict-transport-security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload;

 

Anyone please let me know if any config to be checked. 

 

Thanks,

Praveen

Dear all,

We are doing a 5 system landscape (2 dev, 2 QA & 1 prd) upgrade from SAP 4.6C to ECC 6.0. We are now planning the following:

1. How many security consultants is required for an upgrade project?

2. What all the tasks that an security consultant need to perform during and post upgrade?

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: 🇹🇷 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

In this CodeJam you will learn how to use Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core to implement a retrieval augmented generation (RAG) use case to improve the responses of large language models (LLMs) and reduce hallucinations. You will learn how to deploy an LLM and the orchestration service on SAP AI Core and query it via SAP AI Launchpad and the Python SDK. Furthermore, you will learn about the most important genAI concepts and create and use text chunks and embeddings to improve your RAG response.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Saturday April 12th, 2025 at the NTT Data Business Solutions office in Istanbul, Türkiye 🇹🇷 from 10:00 - 16:00 local time. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructor will be Developer Advocate @noravonthenen.

Prerequisites: Any Chromium-based web browser, such as Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, etc.

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: Posting customer invoices in SAP S/4HANA 2023 TM
entry.content:
@juanigracia Thanks, appreciate your feedback!

I'm not too deep in technical details regarding UI, but for us the customer invoice number is just another 10-digit document number just as deliveries or sales/purchase orders. 

Interesting question regarding the intercompany scenario...Frankly, I never tried it but I would assume that it works. Basically, we have a multi-stage transport and as soon as goods issue is recognized at the outbound delivery, the invoice should be ready to be posted from a TM document. In any way, we're equivalent to the functionality in SD-Billing. So if there are particular checks regarding intercompany scenario, we will process them as well when triggering from TM.

Best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Scope ID 34P ‘Treasury Workstation Cash Integration
entry.content:
Hello Team,

To Implement the Cash Flow Integration (Scope ID 34P) - Replication of company code and bank data in the On-Prem system is mandatory. We found one of the documents "Two-Tier ERP with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" where it mentioned that "Tier 2 & Tier 1 Co code has different Co code set up".

Could you please let us know what the different CO code set means here?

Regards,

Amrita Bachani

entry.title: Re: Payment APIs availability in S4 Hana Public Cloud to send the payment files to the Bank
entry.content:
Hello Hanu,

You can consider integrating with the multi-bank connectivity solution as an option. This is the link to the solution process for your reference: Process Navigator - SAP for Me. 

 

Best regards,

Sharon

entry.title: Requirement segment on component is not taken from BOM header
entry.content:
Hi all

We have a setup where the material to produce has segmentation strategy enabled which is added to the BOM header details on the 'stock segment' field

However, because the component of this BOM is also segmented, we cannot assign a default segment on component level. The reasoning must be that it will default the header requirement based on the strategy setup (we linked the requirement segments 1 on 1)

However, on the planned orders generated by MRP, there is no requirement segment filled in on the component level, which impacts the MRP results

 

Is there any way we can enforce the component requirement segment based on the header segment?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Translation Hub. ABAP Integration How-To
entry.content: @VaraPrasadT  Make sure that the connection with your backend system is fine, and check the user if you are doing it via HTTP. In my case, I used a communication user but the password was locked and even if no error was shown and object lists were not retrieved we cannot see it.  Please check user and password and try again, afterwards it worked for me.

entry.title: Re: Simple Table Maintenance in SAP Fiori Using UI5 Smart Controls
entry.content: Thank you Marian for this nice blog and clear description.

entry.title: 🇦🇪 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Dubai, UAE)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event will give you a hands-on experience with SAP Build for building apps and business processes without code (Low Code/No Code). 

You will get to know the environment by creating:

  • A business app for an online store (SAP Build Apps).
  • A business process for approving purchases (SAP Build Process Automation).
  • A business website (SAP Build Work Zone).

You will get to know the SAP Build lobby, where you access all your SAP Build artifacts, and get a deeper understanding of the following topics:

  • SAP Build Apps
    • Connecting to a backend service
    • Building UIs
    • Binding data
    • Navigation
    • Triggering processes from your app
    • Deploy App to BTP
  • SAP Build Process Automation: 
    • Creating a process
    • Adding approvals
    • Creating actions
    • Calling SAP backends (SAP S/4HANA Cloud and CAP services)
    • Updating data
    • Conditions and GoTo flows
    • Custom variables
  • SAP Build Work Zone(Standard Edition)
    • Create site
    • Create page
    • Create space
    • Embed a Build App

 

Location

ROBERT BOSCH MIDDLE EAST FZE DAFZA, Block A701, West wing 5 - Dubai Airport Free Zone - Dubai - United Arab Emirates

Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/3m2NoFspYMKwHR889

  • This is an in-person event only (not virtual)
  • Thank you to Robert Bosch for hosting this event

Date

Wednesday, March 26th, 2025, from 9:00 to 16:00 GST(local time)

  • A light lunch will be served.

Language

English

The instructors are SAP Developer Advocates @ajmaradiaga and @eshrinivasan 

Please note that spaces are limited to 30. 

  • If you want to attend, register by clicking the Yes button in the Will you be attending? section.

Prerequisites

  • Bring your own laptop with power adapter and have a supported Web browser such as Google Chrome or Firefox installed on your laptop.
  • Complete these SAP Build prerequisites before you come to the event: Set Up Prerequisites for SAP Build CodeJam

entry.title: Re: discounts separately on the purchase order
entry.content: Yes, I think you can add discount condition type manually in each PO after adding this condition type into the pricing procedure (set as manual).

entry.title: Unable to access SAP Build Apps

Hi All,

while I am trying to access any app from SAP Build Apps I receive HTTP ERROR 403.

Can you please help me to resolve this issue.
Thank You.

@Dan_Wroblewski 

SAP Community 
SAP Build 
SAP Build Apps

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content:
@SANA11 

Your import file is for REG0001, the Local currency for this is USD itself. So what currency conversion values is being expected here ? It will be same values as loaded. Also currency conversion will work for all accounts individually. make sure unit and currency  attribute column for the accounts are marked as currency and accounts are not hidden under visible column. Also try to show the report where you are seeing the converted values so that its easy to understand what conversion you see.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Logs: What is the difference between "OpenSearch Disk...
entry.content:
I think the note in the documentation explains the difference between the two storage sizes:

OpenSearch replicates logging data to assure high availability, which doubles the storage space required to store the data volume.

For example, the total storage space is 300 GB for development and half of the storage is used for the original data and the remaining half is for the replica.

There is a similar calculation in the Amazon OpenSearch Service documentation under Calculating storage requirements

In summary, if you have 66 GiB of data at any given time and want one replica, your minimum storage requirement is closer to 66 * 2 * 1.1 / 0.95 / 0.8 = 191 GiB. 

So, I assume that in SAP Commerce Cloud, OpenSearch environments are configured with one replica, which is why the required space is twice the available data space. Additionally, the KBA you mentioned in your comment (SAP KBA 3446887) appears to follow a similar calculation and assumption.

entry.title: Re: How to Use Different Production Version for External...
entry.content:
Thanks for your guidance.

Since I'm using S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, I can't access to ME01 and only to App 'Manage Source Lists'.
I want to figure out how to assign Production Versions in the Source List specifically.

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: Have you checked the value after import? How is your measure amount define?

entry.title: Re: VB6 application with Crystal report
entry.content:
Hi,

Just to say that it is possible to run a VB6 application with Crystal Reports on Windows 10 and 11.  It is not advisable due to VB6 being long out of support, but it is possible.  I might be able to give some advice on this error if you let us know the version of Crystal Reports that you're using and the type of database connection that your reports use.

entry.title: Re: Joule with SFSF – Common Setup Issues
entry.content: Hi @Shreya4 can you please reach us with your Ticket number? you can DM me the number

entry.title: Re: Smarttable fields are changeable although they have b...
entry.content:
@Marian_Zeis  

I would expect that only the fields that are allowed by the RAP framework (metadata from the entity set) are editable. Currently you can edit all fields as soon as the table is set to editable even key fields which should not be editable.(Screenshot 2) If I use the same EntitySet with a SmartField and SmartForms, it will automatically decide whether it is editable or not (Screenshot 1). I would expect the same behavior on column level of the smarttable. You can see this behavior in the two screenshots here. Both Controls have the same EntitySet

entry.title: Upgrade impact to roles 2502
entry.content:
Our test system is upgraded to DIGITS and the production system will be upgraded this weekend.
here we are facing some challenges to identify role changes to adjust.
Kindly share some guides on this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Upgrade impact to roles 2502
entry.content:
Dear Chirag Prajapati,

Please kindly check the following KBA for the 2502 Upgrade about Identity and Access Management :

3533745 - Identity and Access Management (IAM): Change Overview for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 - SAP for Me

You can try to use the app "Manage Business Role Changes After Upgrade" to adjust the roles you are using:

Manage Business Role Changes After Upgrade | SAP Help Portal

Best Practices for Managing Business Role Changes After an Upgrade | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards,

Bell

entry.title: Re: Your Guide to Free Learning Journeys on SAP Finance
entry.content:
Live Sessions complement the learning journey offering. These Finance live sessions are scheduled for this month.

Feb 2025

Master Data and End-of-Day Processes in In-House Banking 2025/02/04 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gn44Swpz
Asset Accounting Integration Aspects 2025/02/06 16:00 https://lnkd.in/gMUASVH9
Scalability of BRIM Solutions - Performance Indicators and Potential 2025/02/10 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gm3mby_D
Flexible Workflow for Payment Processes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud for advanced payment management 2025/02/11 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gaXk-thC
Managing the SAP Cash Application for FI-CA 2025/02/12 10:00 https://lnkd.in/ghJahcct
Posting Control, Allocations, and Settlement in SAP S/4HANA 2025/02/12 14:00 https://lnkd.in/g3ZwYr2i
Taulia Working Capital Management Solutions for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2025/02/13 16:00 https://lnkd.in/gvYNMYdJ
Currency translation in group reporting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2025/02/19 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gm7hh5r4
Currency translation in group reporting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2025/02/19 16:00 https://lnkd.in/gm7hh5r4
BRIM Localization with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) 2025/02/24 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gQiDVUGm

entry.title: Re: Your Guide to Free Learning Journeys on SAP Finance
entry.content:
Live Sessions complement the learning journey offering. These Finance live sessions are scheduled for 

March 2025:

Financial Accounting integration with other modules in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025/03/10 08:00 https://lnkd.in/g_mJtr-a
Financial Accounting integration with other modules in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025/03/10 16:00 https://lnkd.in/g_mJtr-a

Financial Accounting Parallel Reporting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2025/03/11 08:00 https://lnkd.in/gyqVExbb
Configuring Financial Consolidation on SAP Analytics Cloud 2025/03/12 08:00 https://lnkd.in/g9jAKci6
Configuring Financial Consolidation on SAP Analytics Cloud 2025/03/12 16:00 https://lnkd.in/g9jAKci6
Reporting in Group Reporting 2025/03/12 10:00 https://lnkd.in/ghxfT2eU
Reporting in Group Reporting 2025/03/12 16:00 https://lnkd.in/ghxfT2eU
Product Costing Controlling with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2025/03/12 16:00 https://lnkd.in/gikHYfPx
Product Costing Controlling with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2025/03/12 08:00 https://lnkd.in/gikHYfPx
Financial Planning in SAP S/4HANA 2025/03/17 16:00 https://lnkd.in/g2ZH8NQR
Financial Planning in SAP S/4HANA 2025/03/17 08:00 https://lnkd.in/g2ZH8NQR
Performing Consolidation with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting 2025/03/18 08:00 https://lnkd.in/g38N_dst
Performing Consolidation with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting 2025/03/18 16:00 https://lnkd.in/g38N_dst
Validation in Group Reporting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2025/03/20 10:00 https://lnkd.in/gwz425Sx
Intercompany Matching and Elimination in Group Reporting 2025/03/27 10:00 https://lnkd.in/ed32XFCu
Intercompany Matching and Elimination in Group Reporting 2025/03/27 16:00 https://lnkd.in/ed32XFCu
SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Recent Innovations 2025/03/27 15:30 https://lnkd.in/eKxzTigs
Automating Finance with SAP Build Process Automation 2025/06/10 08:00 https://lnkd.in/gNfTmXMv

entry.title: Re: Could not convert from '' to 'USD' on '01.01.2025'. P...
entry.content: Do you have any currency bearing dimension member not having currency property maintained?

entry.title: Re: How to show the Story Filter value in a Textbox in SAC?
entry.content: Ok, than put a script based onResultChange of the table wich is linked to the story filter. But to get the selected members , use getdimensionfilter on the inputcontrol not on the story filter.

entry.title: SAP Build CodeJams in Dubai in March 2025
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Dubai,

For the first time in Dubai, SAP is conducting two CodeJams on Integration Suite and SAP Build topics. These events are hosted by Mark9 Solutions and Robert Bosch respectively. These are free, full day, hands on events on BTP topics for enabling users on the tools and technologies related to Integration Suite and SAP Build. More details on these events and how to register are provided in the links below.

March 25, 2025

🇦🇪SAP CodeJam: Connecting systems and services using SAP Integration Suite 

March 26, 2025

🇦🇪SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code

CC: @ajmaradiaga 

Join, Learn, Collaborate and Network!

entry.title: Re: February's Developer Challenge in SAP Community - Integration 🧩
entry.content: Completed 😀

entry.title: How to change a numeric value to a percentage value in a numeric point chart in SAC?
entry.content:
I have a numeric point chart which shows some value & this value is coming from a filter / input_control in SAC.

I want to use a button to switch between a numeric value & a percentage value in the chart. Is this possible to achieve? Kindly share solutions, if possible!

entry.title: Re: How to Track Approval Details of Maintenance Requests
entry.content:
Hello,

For approval details you may check individual notification change documents.

BR,

Vijayalaxmi Melavanki

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: Well the COGS is the below screenshot is 3104 million which is what you said you expected. Also to see data in USD if you have to create a measure for conversion in the story to show the converted amount.

entry.title: How To Enable Export > Spreadsheet in S_ALR_87012277
entry.content: How To Enable Export > Spreadsheet in S_ALR_87012277

entry.title: Re: Can anyone explain how to maintain flexible replenish...
entry.content:
Hi papa261190,

With the upcoming OP2025 S/4 Hana release this feature becomes fully available. Please have a look at my KBA 3502154 How to maintain checking horizon via BPS - for detailed information.

Right now, it is not possible to setup the horizon in another way - than the old way via total replenishment lead time/planned delivery time and/or goods receipt processing time. Sorry, you have to wait for the next release (OP2025).

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: What is the last column. Do you have a currency dimension separately. I hope you have not loaded the last column which shows currency

Hi Hiri,

what is the need to "run" and "save" the data from an Analytic Model? 

Br,

Tobias

entry.title: External number range for Billing Documents (VF01) possibility in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

we have a requirement to map external number range to billing types in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud edition.

We had assigned external number range and ticked external and this is reflected in NRIV table as well for RV_BELEG  number range object.

However while creating billing document, there is no option to key in manual external number range as per the assignment. Please do let us know any possibility to achieve this SAP S/HANA both in Standard and through enhancement route. 

Also, please advise whether external billing number range is possible if we implement BADI as below.

Could you please advise on the possibility to have external number range for billing documents both in SAP Standard or in enhancement route using BADI without having any prefix in number range. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: @N1kh1l I have added currency column just to show the unit of amount but in actual I haven't uploaded the currency column when importing data. Currency is only maintained in organization dimension

entry.title: Re: Currency Conversion issue in SAC
entry.content: @William_Yu yes it's the same incorrect value appearing in USD

entry.title: Error in ME21N 'Data from Business Add-In ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST not adopted'
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using BADI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST with method PROCESS_ITEM to update UMSON & KNTTP fields and method PROCESS_ACCOUNT to update SAKTO & KOSTL fields during PO creation. 

The system throws an error 'Data from Business Add-In ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST not adopted' in ME21N because of this badi implementation.

I also noticed that the error only occurs if PROCESS_ACCOUNT method is implemented and if I remove this method implementation then I dont get the error.

I already checked SAP notes and community blogs related to this topic but I dont see a solution.

It would be great if someone could post solution to this.

Below is the code snippet for both snippets.

     

Regards,

Sparsh

entry.title: Re: Which changes in object(class or function) can case regenerate related code/objects
entry.content:
So, it dumps also in the DEV system, before transporting.

There's a Solution Manager tool to check a transport request before releasing it, but I don't use this tool, I don't know if it analyses dependencies in the DEV system.

There are these links about the tool:

  • How to detect transport-related errors before they... - SAP Community
  • Transport Request Check Tool - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SF Compensation - Planner Audit for Salary Notes
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec

Thank you for your feedback and for looking into it. Would be great if this could be supported in the future. In case it will not be supported, the option to tick the box for "Auditable" should better not be available.

entry.title: Re: Production Labor cost calculation in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Not sure which excel you are referring to Also clarify at what stage do you calculate cost? What is your expected cost calculation for the example in currency and hours

entry.title: Re: My app can not export PDF anymore after Windows 11 up...
entry.content: Just to answer your question about which DLLs to look for in Procmon. They are called crxf_pdf.dll and crxf_pdf_res_en.dll (last one will depend on language I presume).

entry.title: Re: Stop creation inspection lot for STO in EWM
entry.content:
Hi Chand Basha.S,

you might want toc check SAP notes 3284686 (Stock Transfer with EWM and Quality Management) and 3264621 (Stock transfer from plant to plant creates inspection lot with origin 01).

I assume your material has active inspection type 08 in both plants. I assume inspection type 08 shall be active as well in receiving plant. is it? If not your problem would be solved if you would deactivate inspection type 08 in the receiving plant.

As next step you could check the "SAP Knowledge Base Article" in SAP note 3271931 (Inspection lot with origin 17 is created despite QM is deactivated for movement type in OMJJ) which contains hints how to suppress inspection lot creation.

Also interesting for you might by following customer influence request we are currently working on: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/320456.  

Best regards,

Matthias

entry.title: Re: SAP RISE - Key Learnings
entry.content:
umm, not sure what to say to that - I wrote the comment myself

if you don't think the comment is appropriate then please report it to the Moderators

we should all be encouraging contributions like this

have a great day

Andy.

entry.title: Re: Batch Production Date as the Basic Start Date of a Production Order in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content: Where do you maintain batch production date? Is it maintained in batch classification? What does this date represent? Like Is it a completion date with availability in stock of the batch planned to be produced and is assigned to production/ process order at the time of creation of the order?

entry.title: Re: Stop creation inspection lot for STO in EWM
entry.content:
Hello Chand,

can you please check the delivery tab in the STO. What is the source/destination stock type and more important, what does the QA Control Key indicates?

Kind regards,

Chris

entry.title: Bug Report – Dynamic Text Boxes Not Updating on Subpages When Navigating Directly
entry.content:
We have a story with 28 pages in total—4 main pages and 24 subpages. Our design uses four date/year input controls located on the main pages to update dynamic text boxes across all pages. Each main-page input control is responsible for updating dynamic text boxes on approximately 6–7 subpages.

Issue:
When users bypass the main pages and jump directly to subpages, the dynamic text boxes fail to update. It appears that the necessary data and input control configurations are not loaded because the user did not visit the main page where the controls reside. As a result, the date data is not reflected on the subpages.

Impact:

  • User Experience: End users see outdated or missing date information on subpages.
  • Performance: Adding duplicate input controls to each subpage is not a viable solution as it degrades overall performance.

Request:
Could you please advise on a solution or workaround that ensures dynamic text boxes on subpages load correctly even when users navigate directly to them? We are looking for an approach that does not require placing input controls on every page.

Thank you for your assistance in resolving this issue.

#SAC #SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CREATE1 Short Text for Issuing Storage Location no update
entry.content:
I am able to create PO successfully after calling bapi along with supplying plant in header(POHEADER-SUPPL_PLNT & POHEADERX-SUPPL_PLNT) for STO.

Thank you for your response.

entry.title: Changing pre-delivered master data in public cloud (FS items, subitems, document types, etc.)
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

Please advise on S/4HANA Public Cloud for Group Reporting.

There is a request to change descriptions of some pre-delivered master data such as FS items, subitems and document types because they are somewhat confusing.
To be more specific, our customer wants to change descriptions of the following master data:
- FS Item
- Subitem
- Breakdown Category
- Document Type
- Task
- Consolidation Method

Can they be changed as per customers' request?
Will they be overwritten by pre-delivered entries after upgrade?  

Regards,
Takashiro

entry.title: .NET Core version of SAP Crystal Reports
entry.content:
Hi,

I have read that there are no immediate plans to release a .NET Core version of Crystal Reports.  But, is there really not a long-term plan for this over, say, a 5-10 year period?  If not, this seems to make CR a technological dead-end as far as being used with Visual Studio is concerned.

Thanks.

entry.title: How to extend Flexible Workflow to BTP SBPA on Public cloud to change the final status of PO
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Currently we are trying to implement a Custom Workflow for PO using SAP Build Process Automation(SBPA) but while trying update the PO status field i.e."

PurchasingProcessingStatus" to approved or rejected in the PO API(api_purchaseorder- Version 4) it is a read only field and we are not able to use it, is there any alternative API or field to handle this?

kindly suggest if there is a way to change the status of the PO by linking the Task from Flexible workflow to SBPA. any other approach would also help.

Thank you n advance

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility   SAP Workflow Management, workflow capability  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Re: How can i download my training file fullscreen.tar fr...
entry.content:
Hi,

The prerequisites for this part of the Learning Journey are in the first lesson of the previous unit (about full-screen applications) :

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-sapui5-applications/designing-a-full-screen-application_d32759a4-f312-4539-9b52-a0999fa4fcb7

The files should be downloaded from github.

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP HANA Cloud – December 2024
entry.content:
Dear @thomashammer,

is it possible to use the "GCP Private Service Connect"-feature for a "Google BigQuery Remote Source"?

Cheers

Sven

entry.title: Re: Rev. proxy in front of Hana Express XSA
entry.content:
Hi, 

XS Advanced 1.3.0 or higher eventually supports so called "external domains". You can use this feature to setup a reverse proxy as described here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/PRODUCT_ID/2c1988d620e04368aa4103bf26f17727/4357904d410645ecb14611d6db0a6f38.html

If you use hostname-based routing, you can even use a different port (e.g. 443) for external requests with the option

xs create-domain <your external domain> --external --port 443

Best regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Re: Error in Maintain PIRs when Uploading (Stuck in Loading)
entry.content:
Hi,

I face the same problem when I upload my file. But when I changed the value's format to TEXT, it fixed the issue.

So, make sure everything is in TEXT format and try again.

 BG,

entry.title: Failed to subscribe Build Apps in BTP Trial
entry.content:
Dear experts, I met an issue when subscribing Build Apps in BTP trial using both boster or subscribing directly. All indicating the missing quota for Build Apps in the subaccount.

It's a new one and I checked that the Build Apps quota is used in nowhere but not available to subscribe.

Can anyone help with that? Thanks!

entry.title: where to add security line in Plateau Report properly?
entry.content:
Hi All,

With my simple report, I only have parameters: ReportDestinationCSV adn ReportFormatCSV.

SELECT
s.STUD_ID,
s.NOTACTIVE,
s.LNAME as LAST_NAME,
s.FNAME as FIRST_NAME,
s.DMN_ID as DOMAIN,
s.EMAIL_ADDR as EMAIL
FROM
PA_STUDENT s
LEFT JOIN
PA_INST i ON s.STUD_ID = i.INST_ID
WHERE
i.INST_ID IS NULL
/** AND [security:pa_student s] **/
/** AND [security:pa_inst i] **/

According to Using Plateau Report Designer | SAP Help Portal: "Update the Plateau comment to include the new Report Parameter. Note: Make sure the security line is the last line of the Plateau Comment."

This sql can work without problem in Preview Results in Plateau report designer and also in html, but failed when run in SAP SF LMS. Therefore, I can only suspect I did not add security line in my Plateau Report properly? Kindly share your experience, thank you!

Best, Jessica
